channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Hall of Famer Susie Maxwell Berning, a 4-time major champion while raising 2 daughters, dies at 83
item.description: PALM SPRINGS, Calif. (AP) — Susie Maxwell Berning, the three-time U.S. Women's Open winner who was a pioneer as a mother while competing on the LPGA Tour, died Wednesday after a two-year battle with lung cancer. She was 83.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Higashioka's homer starts rally as Padres beat Braves 5-4 to sweep NL Wild Card Series
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Kyle Higashioka's solo homer started a five-run rally against an ailing Max Fried with two outs in the second inning, and the San Diego Padres held on to sweep the Atlanta Braves with a 5-4 victory in Game 2 of their NL Wild Card Series on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How two Central football players are working to get recruited
item.description: A pair of local high school football stars -- Central High School's Jaime Padilla and Antonio Reyes -- are doing everything they can, even traveling the country to show college football programs what they can do.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Padres beat Braves to advance to NLDS
item.description: The Padres booked their ticket to the National League Division Series on Wednesday, defeating the Atlanta Braves 5-4 in Game 2 of the Wild Card Series at Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Orioles get swept out of the playoffs in their only series for a second consecutive year
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Things went so poorly for the Baltimore Orioles in the playoffs that even when they had the bases loaded and a hit by pitch scores a run, Colton Cowser swung at a ball thrown right at him, missed and broke his left hand in the process.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Days after being suspended Emi Martinez has Prince William celebrating in the Champions League
item.description: Days after being suspended by FIFA, Argentina goalkeeper Emiliano Martínez produced heroics in front of the watching Prince William as Aston Villa sealed another famous win against Bayern Munich.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Detroit Tigers sweep Astros to advance to second round of playoffs
item.description: Andy Ibáñez hit a tiebreaking three-run double in Detroit’s four-run eighth inning, and the Tigers swept the Houston Astros with a 5-2 victory in Game 2 of their AL Wild Card Series.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Jets’ Aaron Rodgers dismisses speculation about disconnect with Robert Saleh after cadence controversy
item.description: Aaron Rodgers has shut down speculation of a fractured relationship with New York Jets head coach Robert Saleh following his comments after Sunday's loss to the Denver Broncos.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Second fan files lawsuit claiming ownership of Shohei Ohtani's 50-50 baseball
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — The claim to Shohei Ohtani's potentially lucrative 50th home run ball grew more complicated this week, with a second fan filing a lawsuit asserting he had possession of the historic baseball.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bay Area News Group high school football predictions: Week 6, 2024
item.description: The guys pick 15 games across the Bay Area, including Los Gatos at Pittsburg, Archbishop Riordan at St. Ignatius, Saratoga at Monta Vista, St. Francis at Archbishop Mitty, and more.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Whittingham hopes to have Cam Rising back after bye week
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off a disappointing 23-10 loss to Arizona last week, Utah's offensive problems were exposed, especially in the passing game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Column: Lightning and thunder could bode well for Bears' offense
item.description: The Chicago Bears have developed a formidable 1-2 punch in running backs D'Andre Swift and Roschon Johnson, who have shown the ability to both smash and slice through defenses, but the success of the offense depends on the performance of the offensive line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Basketball Hall of Famer Dikembe Mutombo dies at 58
item.description: Mutombo starred in the NBA for 18 seasons and is considered to be one of the greatest defensive players in the history of the sport.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Dikembe Mutombo, a Hall of Fame player, dies at 58 from brain cancer
item.description: Mutombo, a Basketball Hall of Famer who was one of the best defensive players in NBA history, died Monday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Fred Warner's pick-6 helps the 49ers snap a 2-game skid with a 30-13 win over the Patriots
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Even after all the success the San Francisco 49ers had the past few seasons, a two-game skid and a string of injuries early in the season can raise some doubts for any team. Considered those answered for one day at least.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: College GameDay makes first-ever appearance at Berkeley
item.description: (KRON) -- Since taking its show on the road back in 1993, "College GameDay" has been a huge presence in the college football community by being known to travel across dozens of campuses across the country.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: MLB regular season ends Sunday, playoffs to begin Oct. 1
item.description: The MLB post-season begins Oct. 1 with the Wild Card series. The end of the regular season marks an end to the Athletics' time in Oakland.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Bears vs. Rams: Injuries, inactives and keys to Sunday's game at Soldier Field
item.description: Los Angeles Rams (1-2) at Chicago Bears (1-2) Sunday, Noon, FOX UPDATE: The Bears just released their list of inactives on X. Inactive for Sunday's game are WR Velus Jones Jr., FB Khari Blasingame, DL Dominique Robinson, DB Terrell Smith, OL Bill Murray and DL Zacch Pickens.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utes offense struggles in 23-10 loss to Arizona
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The absence of Cam Rising finally caught up to the Utah football team, as the Utes offense produced just one touchdown and one field goal in a 23-10 loss to Arizona Saturday night at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah Royals beat Racing Lousiville 1-0
item.description: In their third-to-last home game of the season, Utah Royals FC beat Racing Louisville 1-0 off of a goal from Ana Tejada. There were chances from both sides during the match, but only one shot made it into the back of the net on the night.
item.dc:creator: Stockton Mair, ABC 4

item.title: USF football falls at Tulane in conference opener
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (USF) -- The South Florida football team fell in its conference-opening clash with Tulane, 45-10, at Yulman Stadium in New Orleans Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: University of South Florida, WFLA, NBC
